name: Peta Spanish Tofu Omelette
recipeIngredient: 1/4 of a Green bell pepper, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a frying pan over medium heat, heat the oil or water.
2. Saute the garlic, onion, potato, and green bell pepper until the potato is cooked, about 10 minutes.
3. Blend the remaining ingredients in a blender until smooth. Add the tomato and tofu mixture to the pan and cook, covered, over very low heat until the omelette is set, about 10 minutes.
4. Serve with salsa.
